nation: Première Nation des Innus de Nutashkuan
economic_notes: GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Placements Innus-Nutashkuan S.E.C. (holds 51% in Construction Atik S.E.C. and 51% in 9286-1020 Quebec inc.) and Produits Forestiers Innus S.E.C. Community depends on SAC and Health Canada for 67% of revenues. Hydro-Quebec Romaine-2 royalties used to guarantee long-term debt. Litigation involving Produits Forestiers Innus (1,094,667 retainer receivable + 592,000 claim) and Construction Atik (2,414,606 lawsuit). SECN contingent liability of 495,000.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Financial statements in French, prepared under Canadian Public Sector Accounting Standards. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Placements Innus-Nutashkuan S.E.C. and Produits Forestiers Innus S.E.C. Net financial assets are negative (net debt position of 11,133,469). Balance sheet detail for cash and TCA not fully extracted from available text. Revenue lines are approximate as full income statement detail was in project-by-project format rather than a consolidated summary. Total expenses from schedule of charges by object = 41,635,347. Accumulated surplus includes reserved surplus of 2,289,274. Prior year adjustment of 523,197 recorded directly to accumulated surplus. COVID-19 uncertainty noted. SECN contingent liability of 495,000 guaranteed by the nation.
